headline: Why Corning (GLW) Stock Is Down Today
summary: Shares of glass and electronic component manufacturer Corning (NYSE:GLW) fell 2.7% in the afternoon session after JPMorgan downgraded the stock to Neutral from Overweight, citing valuation concerns.
